description_long: This doll features a whimsical, sun-themed design with a large, spiked orange sun halo encircling its head. Its face is painted with a wide, mischievous grin, round cheeks, and expressive eyes, giving it a playful and animated appearance. The doll's body is segmented and jointed, resembling a marionette or puppet, with visible mechanical joints at the shoulders, elbows, and knees. It wears voluminous, striped pants in red and yellow, cinched at the waist with a red sash and adorned with ruffled cuffs at the ankles and wrists. The hands are oversized and articulated, with exaggerated fingers, while the feet are curled and stylized, reminiscent of a jester or circus performer. The back of the head reveals mechanical components, adding a touch of steampunk or animatronic flair to the overall aesthetic.
description: A sun-themed, jointed doll with a spiked orange halo, wide grin, and striped circus-style pants, featuring articulated limbs and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, sun halo, outstretched right hand, and striped pants with ruffled cuffs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thin profile, mechanical joints, and the sun halo's depth, with the left arm extended forward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the mechanical structure at the back of the head, the back of the striped pants, and the symmetrical sun halo.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right arm extended, curled foot, and the layered construction of the sun halo and limbs.
attribute_clothing_style: Circus-inspired attire with voluminous red and yellow vertically striped pants, a red sash belt, and ruffled cuffs at the wrists and ankles, evoking a jester or carnival performer aesthetic.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its torso facing forward, right arm extended outward with palm open, left arm bent at the elbow with hand raised, legs slightly apart, and head facing directly ahead.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide, exaggerated smile with upturned mouth corners, large open eyes, and raised eyebrows, conveying a playful and mischievous expression.
attribute_hair_style: No traditional hair; instead, an orange spiked sun-shaped halo encircles the head, mimicking stylized sun rays.
